title: deer-flow.research.dispatch v1
description: Published by home-automation (or any project) to request a deer-flow research cycle. Consumed by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer which runs meta_probe and emits deer-flow.research.cycle.completed.v1.

research_id.description: Caller-assigned correlation ID. Echoed in the completed event so the caller can match results.

question.description: Natural-language research question passed verbatim to meta_probe.

question_class.description: meta_probe question class — tunes critic weighting and auditor expectations.

project_source.description: Identifier of the publishing project (e.g. 'home-automation'). Used for KB write path and telemetry.

budget_usd.description: Model cost budget for the cycle in USD.

timeout_s.description: Maximum wall-clock seconds to wait for cycle completion before emitting a timeout error.

callback_channel.description: Optional extra nervous-bus channel to echo the completed event to, in addition to deer-flow.research.cycle.completed.v1.
